policy: Decision-critical modules must either be runtime-connected with execution proof or explicitly classified as non-runtime research/quarantine/test/deprecated before they can be referenced in architecture maturity claims.

modules.claim_boundary: Active report-path module. Runtime claims are limited to the report/signal path proven by the referenced guard test.
Active signal-generation module on the report/signal path. Runtime claims are limited to the proven path.
Active executable-signal validation helper on the BUY_WATCH signal path.
Orthogonal confidence scoring helper. Not counted as active runtime decision-stack evidence until wired into a production entry point and promoted with a runtime execution proof.

Standalone data-quality engine. Not counted as active runtime data-quality enforcement until wired into scanner/report/signal evidence and promoted with proof. Existing active data-quality contract remains DATA1/P161.
Event-risk research helper with placeholder-feed boundary. It must not imply live calendar-backed event-risk enforcement until a live feed and runtime proof exist.
Liquidity/volatility assessment helper. Not counted as active runtime environment filter until connected to report/signal/validator path with execution proof.
